name: Mobile MCP
description_en: Mobile-automation MCP server for iOS and Android—drives simulators, emulators, and physical devices for UI testing and scraping.
description_zh: 面向 iOS 与 Android 的移动自动化 MCP 服务——驱动模拟器、仿真器与真机,用于 UI 测试与抓取。
long_en: Mobile MCP exposes mobile device control to agents via Appium-style automation, working across iOS and Android targets so a model can tap, type, and inspect app screens.
long_zh: Mobile MCP 通过类 Appium 的自动化把移动设备控制开放给智能体,覆盖 iOS 与 Android,让模型可点击、输入并检视应用界面。
sec_note_en: Drives real devices and apps; review which targets it can reach before enabling.
sec_note_zh: 可驱动真机与应用;启用前请审阅其可访问的目标范围。
